title: Bead introspection CLI ergonomics
description: Feature container for spec spec-df49daa7. Coordinates implementation of takt bead history subcommand, --field projection on bead show, and --status/--agent/--feature-root filters on bead list. Developer beads are ordered to prevent file conflicts: parser and formatting helpers run in parallel first, then bead.py handlers are sequenced (history → show --field → list filters).
acceptance_criteria: All 21 new tests in tests/test_cli_bead.py pass
uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q passes with no regressions
takt bead history, --field, --status, --agent, and --feature-root are all documented in --help output for their respective subcommands
CLAUDE.md Working with Beads section lists new commands as canonical introspection paths
